home.name: Elias Bakhshi
home.title: Full Stack Engineer
home.description: Creative, target oriented and passionate engineer with a knack for building dynamic applications.
home.about: A passionate software engineer currently working at Blekinge Institute of Technology (BTH). My journey as a developer started when I was 12 years old, and I thrive in collaborative environments where I can contribute with my creativity and problem-solving skills. My goal is to use my knowledge to create innovative solutions that have a positive impact.

experiencesList.title: Web Developer
experiencesList.description: Customized WordPress plugins, integrated the company's monitoring system (Iris) with Slack, and redesigned the company's FAQ.

experiencesList.title: Full Stack Developer
experiencesList.description: Developed multiple portals in a team, connecting them to an automation system (n8n.io) and focusing on UX/UI design.

experiencesList.title: Change Maker
experiencesList.description: An innovation lab where we developed ideas and solutions to create meaningful leisure activities and inspire hope for the future among young people as a part-time job.

experiencesList.title: Full Stack Developer
experiencesList.description: Worked on projects for Volvo and Göteborg & Co., focusing on CI/CD, Agile (Scrum), AWS configuration, and UX/UI design.

experiencesList.title: Full Stack Developer
experiencesList.description: Developed and designed projects using CI/CD for automatic deployment, Agile (Scrum) methodologies for project management, and a strong focus on UX/UI design.

experiencesList.title: Web Developer & CEO
experiencesList.description: Started as a young entrepreneur, then launched my own company with the same name and worked as a consultant for other businesses as a side hustle.

roles.title: Prepp Leader
roles.description: Provide support for new students at BTH and give tips on studies, social activities, training, creating contact areas, housing, etc.

roles.title: Student Ambassador
roles.description: Represent BTH at various student fairs and get in touch with those who are looking for their future education.

roles.title: Innovation Ambassador
roles.description: Organize events and support students in turning their ideas into businesses or products.

roles.title: Student Mentor
roles.description: Support students who need extra help with their studies.

roles.title: Teacher's Assistant
roles.description: Support students who want to learn the programming language C++.

contactSection.title: Take a Coffee?
contactSection.description: If you want to discuss a project, have a question, or just want to say hi, feel free to contact me. I would love to hear from you!

statusMessages.success: Thank you! I will get back to you soon.

projects.title: Projects

projectsList.title: Hemservice Omsorg
projectsList.description: Hemservice Omsorg Örebro is a company in the cleaning industry. They offer cleaning services for both private individuals and businesses in Örebro and the surrounding area.

projectsList.title: Norrlands Bil
projectsList.description: Norrlands Bil is a car dealership in Sweden. They offer a wide range of new and used cars, as well as financing options.

projectsList.title: FMS Portal
projectsList.description: FMS is a fleet management system that helps businesses manage their vehicles and drivers.

projectsList.title: Security Portal
projectsList.description: Security is a system that helps businesses manage their security and access control.

projectsList.title: Gothenburg’s 400th anniversary
projectsList.description: GGothenburg’s 400th anniversary is a project that showcases the best of Gothenburg's culture and innovation.
